# Peak Care

> Independent technical property expertise and renovation in Bulgaria for international investors and owners. Pre-purchase building inspection, ongoing technical property oversight, renovation and refurbishment, sound insulation, and moisture/mould remediation — guided by decades of hands-on building experience. Reports in German and English.

Peak Care (peak-care.com) serves foreign and domestic investors, buyers and property owners who need reliable, independent technical judgement about buildings in Bulgaria — before they buy and throughout ownership. We are an independent building expert, not a seller's agent and not a certified sworn surveyor: we provide experience-based technical visual inspections and coordinate renovation on the ground. Where a certified appraisal, notary or lawyer is required, we refer to the right local professionals.

Core value: know what you are buying before you sign, and keep the building sound afterwards. Mould/moisture is only one of several specialities — not the headline.

## Key services
- [Pre-Purchase Building Inspection Bulgaria](https://peak-care.com/bauinspektion-vor-dem-kauf-bulgarien): Independent technical inspection of the building fabric before you buy — structure, damp, statics, hidden defects — with a structured inspection report, photo documentation, prioritised defect list, renovation cost orientation and a clear purchase verdict. For international investors and owners.
- [Technical Property Oversight Bulgaria](https://peak-care.com/technische-immobilienueberwachung-bulgarien): Ongoing condition assessment and monitoring of a property for absentee owners — periodic checks, photo reports, moisture and mould assessment, building condition review.
- [Renovation & Conversion Bulgaria](https://peak-care.com/service/renovierung-umbau-ausbau-bulgarien): German-standard renovation, refurbishment and conversion management for foreign owners in Bulgaria — documented, coordinated on the ground.
- [Basement Waterproofing & Damp Control](https://peak-care.com/service/kellerabdichtung-bansko): Diagnosis and lasting fix of rising/penetrating damp and basement waterproofing.
- [Mould & Moisture Remediation](https://peak-care.com/service/schimmelbeseitigung-bansko): Diagnosis and lasting remediation of damp and mould — one Peak Care speciality among several.

## Company & contact
- Independent building expert for Bulgaria (Bansko/Razlog base, service nationwide), also serving German-speaking (DACH) owners buying in Bulgaria.
- Contact: peakcare@peak-care.com · +359 89 843 6561
- Reports and correspondence in German and English.
- Not a certified sworn appraiser ("Baugutachter"/"Sachverständiger"): experience-based technical inspection; independent of sellers and agents.

## Guides & knowledge
- [Blog](https://peak-care.com/blog): Practical guides on buying property in Bulgaria as a foreigner, renovation costs, damp and mould causes and remedies, and pre-purchase inspection.
- [E-Books & Shop](https://peak-care.com/ebooks): Downloadable guides.
